description: Template for campaign shocks, late-breaking events, narrative changes, and turnout or coalition responses during an election.

starter_sources.description: reputable state or district polling and aggregate polling trend data
calendar, ballot-access rules, early voting and turnout rules
fundraising filings, ad buys, endorsement timelines, field-operation indicators

ingestion_priorities: historical analogs for similar campaign shocks
freshness_notes: Polling and turnout indicators decay quickly. Structural election rules stay relevant for the full cycle. Historical analogs are useful for pattern matching, not direct probability claims.
